comments: Tommy notes that the East German band played, Reform would only be able to perform live in churches as the state decreed that the Church would be able to 'control' the people who like that type of music. The single was given to John Peel who passed it onto Tommy.
The winner of the Friday Night Connection won a record token worth £24 as the competition had rolled over!
After playing a track from the new Genesis album (straight in at number one this week), TV says that by Christmas 1983 some 500 different albums would be available on CD!!
Tommy asks for favourite rock tracks to be sent in for the upcoming fifth birthday show.
